name: SPLASH OUT!
short_description: The ultimate high-speed run game for the survival of DNA! You splash out into the unknown world, and your battle begins now!
detailed_description:
Ultimate survival in this world is the taking of life.
You splash out into the unknown as a "life connecter".
Avoid the various threat cells and compete with over 100 million other competitors to reach the finish line.

Streaming Policy

Streaming and broadcasting of this game are allowed regardless of whether it is for profit or the nature of the entity (individual or corporate).



  • GAME SYSTEM
    While avoiding obstacles, aim for the lighted goal at the back. Your energy decreases when you hit obstacles and gradually decreases even if you do nothing. Use energy objects along the way to recover.

    Speed Cubes temporarily increase your speed. If you get them in a row, your speed will increase even more. There are several types of speed cubes; the larger the cube, the faster and longer it takes.

    There are also bombs available to clear out obstacles in front of you.



  • ENDLESS MODE NEW
    In this newly added mode, players compete to see how far they can advance through ring-shaped gates placed at short intervals, avoiding randomly generated obstacles.
    Energy objects do not appear; instead, players can regenerate their energy by passing through the gates.



  • CUSTOM
    Depending on the number of energy objects and speed cubes you acquire during play, you will receive enhancement points. You can use these points to enhance your abilities and obtain new aircraft.

  • ONLINE LEADERBOARD
    Leaderboards record your time to the ending, your clear time in each of the five areas, and your distance traveled and number of gates passed in endless mode.
    Compete against players from around the world!



The controls are intuitive and easy to understand, and the game is simple to play with a sense of speed and exhilarating levitation.
Show off your best score on the leaderboard!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Japanese, Spanish - Spain
